title: After spending a month with the Mission 1 Pro I think it could be the ultimate vacation camera if you pick up the point-and-shoot grip — I just wish it was better for stills
summary: The GoPro Mission 1 Pro is a more premium action camera than previous GoPros, with 8K/60p recording capabilities and better low-light performance thanks to its new sensor. The downside of all this is that the Mission 1 Pro doesn’t come cheap.
caption: output/2026-07-17/after-spending-a-month-with-the-mission-1-pro-i-think-it-could-be-the-.txt
